title: SME Agri-Lending Scheme
description: A dedicated fund for small-scale farmers to acquire irrigation equipment and high-quality seeds. The scheme uses warehouse receipts as collateral to reduce risk.
shortDescription: Agri-lending fund using warehouse receipts as collateral for SMEs.

title: Clean Energy Infrastructure Fund
description: Financing for solar-powered cold storage facilities in rural markets to reduce post-harvest losses for vegetable farmers.
shortDescription: Solar cold storage financing for rural agricultural markets.
